meaning: adj.咀嚼的,咀嚼用的n.咀嚼物,咀嚼剂
examples: Objective to study the importance of suitable polished surface to raise masticatory efficiency.
Masticatory muscle myositis (MMM) is an inflammatory disease in dogs affecting the muscles of the jaw.
Objective: to investigate the culture method in vitro and the bionomics of masticatory muscle satellite cells.
